mapper.select: SELECT id, job_name, status, total_items, processed_items, success_count, failure_count, progress_percent, failure_at_item, processing_delay_ms, current_item, recent_events, created_at, started_at, completed_at, updated_at FROM online_batch_jobs WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, job_name, status, total_items, processed_items, success_count, failure_count, progress_percent, failure_at_item, processing_delay_ms, current_item, recent_events, created_at, started_at, completed_at, updated_at FROM online_batch_jobs ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO online_batch_jobs ( job_name, status, total_items, processed_items, success_count, failure_count, progress_percent, failure_at_item, processing_delay_ms, current_item, recent_events, created_at, started_at, completed_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{jobName}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{totalItems}, #{processedItems}, #{successCount}, #{failureCount}, #{progressPercent}, #{failureAtItem}, #{processingDelayMs}, #{currentItem}, #{recentEvents}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE online_batch_jobs SET status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, processed_items = #{processedItems}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, current_item = #{currentItem}, recent_events = #{recentEvents}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
